items.title_en: South Africa condemns 'fake videos' of alleged xenophobic attacks
items.title_zh: 南非谴责涉嫌仇外袭击的“虚假视频”
items.desc_en: As claims of xenophobia in South Africa mount, Ghana calls on the African Union to send a fact-finding mission.
items.desc_zh: 随着南非仇外情绪的增加，加纳呼吁非洲联盟派遣实况调查团。

items.title_en: Disturbances and 127 arrests mar Paris party after PSG Champions League victory
items.title_zh: 巴黎圣日耳曼欧冠夺冠后巴黎派对发生骚乱并逮捕127人
items.desc_en: Fans took to the streets to celebrate the Paris team's qualification for the final, but celebrations were marred by disturbances.
items.desc_zh: 球迷们走上街头庆祝巴黎队晋级决赛，但庆祝活动却因骚乱而受到破坏。

items.title_en: Race to trace passengers who left hantavirus cruise ship at island
items.title_zh: 竞相追踪在岛上离开汉坦病毒游轮的乘客
items.desc_en: A 69-year-old woman who later died in South Africa is among those who left MV Hondius at St Helena.
items.desc_zh: 在圣赫勒拿岛离开 MV Hondius 的人中包括一名 69 岁的妇女，后来在南非去世。

items.title_en: US judge releases Jeffrey Epstein's purported suicide note
items.title_zh: 美国法官公布了杰弗里·爱泼斯坦的遗书
items.desc_en: Epstein's former cellmate claims he found the note, which has not been verified by the BBC.
items.desc_zh: 爱泼斯坦的前狱友声称他发现了这张纸条，但这一消息尚未得到英国广播公司 (BBC) 的证实。

items.title_en: China announces suspended death sentences for former defence ministers
items.title_zh: 中国宣布暂缓执行前国防部长死刑
items.desc_en: The announcement follows recent ousting of several top officials in China's military.
items.desc_zh: 此前，中国军方几名高级官员最近被罢黜。

items.title_en: How the U.S. military and Maersk got a ship to pass through the Strait of Hormuz
items.title_zh: 美国军方和马士基如何让船只通过霍尔木兹海峡
items.desc_en: Maersk CEO Vincent Clerc said the shipping giant had deliberately taken a "very cautious approach" during the Middle East crisis.
items.desc_zh: 马士基首席执行官文森特·克莱克表示，该航运巨头在中东危机期间故意采取“非常谨慎的态度”。

items.title_en: Inside India newsletter: Social media is reshaping the world's fastest-growing market for global brands
items.title_zh: 印度内部通讯：社交媒体正在重塑全球品牌增长最快的市场
items.desc_en: Social media influencers are urging consumers to read labels and pushing traditional companies to make healthier products or risk being replaced by newer entrants.
items.desc_zh: 社交媒体影响者敦促消费者阅读标签，并推动传统公司生产更健康的产品，否则就有被新进入者取代的风险。

items.title_en: In 'Musk v Altman', this judge will make the final call
items.title_zh: 在“马斯克诉奥特曼”中，这位法官将做出最终决定
items.desc_en: The feud has fuelled a costly showdown between two tech titans.
items.desc_zh: 这场不和加剧了两家科技巨头之间代价高昂的摊牌。

items.title_en: Former OpenAI board member says Elon Musk offered her sperm donations
items.title_zh: 前 OpenAI 董事会成员表示埃隆·马斯克愿意捐献她的精子
items.desc_en: Shivon Zilis is the mother of four of Musk's children. That relationship began as she advised OpenAI.
items.desc_zh: Shivon Zilis 是马斯克四个孩子的母亲。这种关系始于她为 OpenAI 提供建议时。

items.title_en: Robot wars - what an operation in Ukraine tells us about the battlefield of the near future
items.title_zh: 机器人战争——乌克兰的一次行动告诉我们关于不久的将来的战场
items.desc_en: After Ukraine's President Zelensky said territory had been captured using just robots and drones, what is the future of unmanned warfare?
items.desc_zh: 在乌克兰总统泽伦斯基表示仅使用机器人和无人机就占领了领土之后，无人战争的未来是什么？

items.title_en: Apple to pay $250m to iPhone buyers over AI features lawsuit
items.title_zh: 苹果因 AI 功能诉讼向 iPhone 买家支付 2.5 亿美元
items.desc_en: Claims from last year said the tech firm’s advertising of Apple Intelligence fooled iPhone buyers.
items.desc_zh: 去年的指控称，这家科技公司的 Apple Intelligence 广告欺骗了 iPhone 买家。

items.title_en: 'I thought he was going to hit me' OpenAI co-founder says of Musk
items.title_zh: OpenAI 联合创始人谈到马斯克时说：“我以为他会打我”
items.desc_en: Brockman spoke during the second week of a month-long trial between Musk and OpenAI's Sam Altman.
items.desc_zh: 布罗克曼是在马斯克和 OpenAI 的萨姆·奥尔特曼为期一个月的试验的第二周发表讲话的。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: A sleep apnoea wearable. Plus, tech to free up hospital beds and a breast health app.
items.desc_zh: 睡眠呼吸暂停可穿戴设备。另外，还有可以腾出医院床位的技术和乳房健康应用程序。

items.title_en: US to safety test new AI models from Google, Microsoft, xAI
items.title_zh: 美国将对谷歌、微软、xAI 的新人工智能模型进行安全测试
items.desc_en: New agreements between the companies and the Commerce department build on Biden-era pacts.
items.desc_zh: 这些公司与商务部之间的新协议以拜登时代的协议为基础。

items.title_en: Pornhub to become accessible again for some UK users
items.title_zh: Pornhub 将再次对一些英国用户开放
items.desc_en: UK iPhone users who have completed Apple's device-based age checks will no longer be blocked from the site's adult content.
items.desc_zh: 完成 Apple 基于设备的年龄检查的英国 iPhone 用户将不再被阻止访问该网站的成人内容。

items.title_en: Oscars says AI actors, writing cannot win awards
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡称人工智能演员、编剧不能获奖
items.desc_en: The academy that controls the Oscars on Friday issued new award eligibility requirements around the use of artificial intelligence in film.
items.desc_zh: 周五，负责奥斯卡颁奖典礼的学院针对人工智能在电影中的使用发布了新的获奖资格要求。

items.title_en: Bright idea? UK firm pioneers data centres using lampposts
items.title_zh: 好主意？英国公司开创了使用灯柱的数据中心
items.desc_en: The solar-powered iLamps will have a built-in Nvidia chip but there are questions over their security and scalability.
items.desc_zh: 太阳能 iLamps 将内置 Nvidia 芯片，但其安全性和可扩展性存在问题。

items.title_en: Pentagon says US military to be an 'AI-first' fighting force
items.title_zh: 五角大楼表示美军将成为一支“人工智能优先”的战斗部队
items.desc_en: The US military has agreed eight new contracts with big tech firms as it expands its artificial intelligence capabilities.
items.desc_zh: 美国军方在扩大人工智能能力的同时，已与大型科技公司签订了八份新合同。
